SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore

Packages that use com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc
 
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web
 
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.config
    Class
    Description
    ClusterSeriesSampler
    Periodically samples the merged cluster aggregate (a MetricsSource) into a ClusterSeriesStore, producing the cluster-wide trend for cluster.mode=shared-store.
    ClusterSeriesStore
    Bounded, time-ordered ring of cluster-wide trend points for cluster.mode=shared-store, pruned by a RetentionPolicy (age + size, oldest first).
    SnapshotStore
    Where pushed per-instance ClusterSnapshots are held for the shared-store tier.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore
    Class
    Description
    ClusterSeriesStore
    Bounded, time-ordered ring of cluster-wide trend points for cluster.mode=shared-store, pruned by a RetentionPolicy (age + size, oldest first).
    RetentionPolicy
    Two independent bounds applied to retained trend history (design §5.4): an age bound (RetentionPolicy.maxAge) and a size bound (RetentionPolicy.maxEntries, oldest truncated first).
    SnapshotStore
    Where pushed per-instance ClusterSnapshots are held for the shared-store tier.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore.jdbc
    Class
    Description
    SnapshotStore
    Where pushed per-instance ClusterSnapshots are held for the shared-store tier.
  • Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source.sharedstore used by com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.web
    Class
    Description
    SnapshotStore
    Where pushed per-instance ClusterSnapshots are held for the shared-store tier.
